goal_evolve.title: Evolve Trading Strategies Autonomously
goal_evolve.role: The system must autonomously generate, evaluate, mutate, and select trading strategies without human intervention, using open-ended evolutionary dynamics.
goal_evolve.tech: Implemented via the Genome Pipeline (L-System → Graph → FSM → Phenotype), Fitness Calculator, and Niche Discovery in tr4d3rz-evolution (Rust).
goal_evolve.relations: Realized by the Evolutionary Computing Service. Supported by the Persistence Service for archetype memory.

goal_distribute.title: Distributed Heterogeneous Computation
goal_distribute.role: Computation must span heterogeneous hardware (ARM1176 RPi, x86_64 Linux, ARM64 Android, Cortex-M, Xtensa) with no global synchronization, enabling true distributed evolutionary ecology.
goal_distribute.tech: Achieved via MQTT-based asynchronous messaging (NanoMQ on RPi1), CBOR serialization for embedded nodes, and the Capsule System for offline nodes.
goal_distribute.relations: Realized by all Application Services. Enabled by the Core Infrastructure Node (RPi1 + NanoMQ).

prin_openended.title: Open-Ended Evolution
prin_openended.type_desc: ArchiMate Principle — a fundamental architectural guideline.
prin_openended.role: No hard limits on genome complexity, FSM depth, or niche count. The system must be capable of discovering structures that were not anticipated at design time.
prin_openended.tech: Enforced by the L-System grammar (recursive production rules), the Graph Expansion module, and the absence of a fixed fitness function ceiling.
prin_openended.relations: Influences the Evolutionary Process goal. Constrains the Genome Pipeline design.

prin_async.title: Asynchronous Distributed Ecology
prin_async.type_desc: ArchiMate Principle — a fundamental architectural guideline.
prin_async.role: No global clock, no global synchronization. Each node publishes and subscribes independently. Offline nodes are treated as 'delayed evolutionary nodes', not failures.
prin_async.tech: Implemented via MQTT QoS 0/1/2 topic hierarchy, NanoMQ broker on RPi1, and the Delayed Sync component in Gateway Nodes.
prin_async.relations: Influences all Application Services. Realized by the MQTT messaging infrastructure.

driver_research.title: Evolutionary Research Platform
driver_research.type_desc: ArchiMate Driver — an external or internal condition that motivates the architecture.
driver_research.role: TR4D3RZ is designed as a research platform for studying open-ended evolution in financial markets, not just a trading system.
driver_research.tech: Manifested in the Observatory's Theory Map, the Archetype Library, and the Niche Atlas.
driver_research.relations: Motivates the Observability and Evolution goals.

proc_evolution.title: Evolutionary Process
proc_evolution.type_desc: ArchiMate Business Process — a sequence of behaviors achieving a business outcome.
proc_evolution.role: The core evolutionary loop: generate genomes via L-System, compile to FSM, evaluate fitness on OHLCV data, select survivors, mutate, repeat. Runs continuously on Evolution Nodes.
proc_evolution.tech: Implemented in tr4d3rz-evolution (Rust). Uses L-System grammar for genome generation, petgraph for graph representation, and custom FSM compiler.
proc_evolution.relations: Realized by Evolutionary Computing Service. Consumes OHLCV data. Produces Fitness Records and Cooperative Signals.

proc_signal.title: Cooperative Signal Generation
proc_signal.type_desc: ArchiMate Business Process — a sequence of behaviors achieving a business outcome.
proc_signal.role: Agents broadcast behavioral signals (entry/exit conditions, niche membership, fitness updates) to the ecosystem, enabling emergent cooperative behaviors without direct coupling.
proc_signal.tech: Published to ecosystem/signal/# MQTT topic in CBOR format, QoS 0. Consumed by other Evolution Nodes and the Observatory.
proc_signal.relations: Realized by the Signaling System. Produces Cooperative Signal data objects.

svc_prediction.title: Prediction Service
svc_prediction.type_desc: ArchiMate Business Service — an explicitly defined exposed business behavior.
svc_prediction.role: The external-facing output of the system: daily investment signals for Italian stocks, derived from the highest-fitness FSM archetypes currently active in the ecosystem.
svc_prediction.tech: Signals are published to ecosystem/archetype/# MQTT topic (CBOR, QoS 2). The Observatory Market Overlay correlates signals with market events.
svc_prediction.relations: Served by Core Infrastructure Service and Evolutionary Computing Service.

evo_svc.title: Evolutionary Computing Service
evo_svc.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Service — an explicitly defined exposed application behavior.
evo_svc.role: The main service of Evolution Nodes. Runs the full evolutionary loop: genome generation, FSM compilation, fitness evaluation, mutation, and cooperative signaling.
evo_svc.tech: Rust implementation across tr4d3rz-core, tr4d3rz-evolution, tr4d3rz-messaging. Deployed on Linux PCs, Android (ARM64), and MIMXRT1050 (Cortex-M7).
evo_svc.relations: Realizes Evolutionary Process. Consumes OHLCV data. Produces Fitness Records and Signals.

evo_mutation.title: Mutation Engine (structural · parametric · crossover)
evo_mutation.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

evo_cluster.title: Clustering System (niche discovery · GA)
evo_cluster.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

evo_niche.title: Niche Discovery (market regime classification)
evo_niche.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

evo_phenotype.title: Phenotype Analyzer (FSM runtime evaluation)
evo_phenotype.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

evo_mqtt.title: MQTT Client (tr4d3rz-messaging · Rust)
evo_mqtt.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

lsystem.title: L-System Generator (topology · modularity · recursion)
lsystem.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

graph_exp.title: Graph Expansion (normalized graph)
graph_exp.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

fsm_gen.title: FSM Generator (state/transition table)
fsm_gen.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

phenotype.title: Phenotype Runtime (executes FSM · emits signals)
phenotype.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

cond_ohlcv.title: OHLCV Condition
cond_ohlcv.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — primitive condition evaluator.
cond_ohlcv.role: Evaluates raw OHLCV conditions: price thresholds, volume spikes, candlestick patterns. The most basic building block of FSM transition conditions.
cond_ohlcv.tech: Rust (tr4d3rz-core). Condition types: price_above, price_below, volume_spike, gap_up, gap_down, body_ratio.
cond_ohlcv.relations: Used by FSM Compiler as primitive condition node.

cond_ind.title: Indicator Primitives (EMA · SMA · IIR · volatility · range)
cond_ind.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

cond_bucket.title: Bucketization Engine
cond_bucket.role: Discretizes continuous OHLCV values into categorical buckets (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/EXTREME) for FSM state matching. Enables the FSM to handle continuous market data.
cond_bucket.tech: Rust (tr4d3rz-core). Bucket boundaries configurable per symbol. Adaptive bucketization based on historical distribution.
cond_bucket.relations: Transforms OHLCV values. Used by OHLCV Condition and Indicator Primitives.

cond_temporal.title: Temporal Conditions
cond_temporal.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — time-based condition evaluator.
cond_temporal.role: Evaluates time-based conditions: day of week, time of day, days since event, market session. Enables strategies that exploit temporal market patterns.
cond_temporal.tech: Rust (tr4d3rz-core). Condition types: time_of_day, day_of_week, days_since_signal, market_session.
cond_temporal.relations: Used by FSM Compiler as temporal condition node.

cond_coop.title: Cooperative Conditions
cond_coop.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — inter-agent condition evaluator.
cond_coop.role: Evaluates conditions based on signals from other agents: niche membership, signal consensus, archetype presence. Enables emergent cooperative behaviors.
cond_coop.tech: Rust (tr4d3rz-core). Subscribes to ecosystem/signal/# MQTT topic. Condition types: niche_member, signal_consensus, archetype_active.
cond_coop.relations: Consumes Cooperative Signals from MQTT. Used by FSM Compiler.

fit_calc.title: Fitness Calculator
fit_calc.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — multi-dimensional fitness evaluation.
fit_calc.role: Evaluates the fitness of each agent using a multi-dimensional formula: Base Metrics (trade_count, CAGR, profit_factor) + Advanced Metrics (signal_entropy, stat_confidence, computational_efficiency).
fit_calc.tech: Rust (tr4d3rz-evolution). Fitness formula: F = w1*CAGR + w2*profit_factor + w3*signal_entropy + w4*stat_confidence + w5*comp_efficiency. Weights configurable.
fit_calc.relations: Evaluates Phenotype trade log. Produces Fitness Record. Input to Niche Evaluator.

fit_niche.title: Niche Evaluator
fit_niche.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — emergent niche discovery.
fit_niche.role: Clusters agents by behavioral similarity to discover emergent market niches. Uses fitness vector distance to identify agents that have specialized to similar market conditions.
fit_niche.tech: Rust (tr4d3rz-evolution). Clustering algorithm: k-means or DBSCAN on fitness vectors. Publishes niche assignments to ecosystem/niche/# MQTT topic.
fit_niche.relations: Consumes Fitness Records. Produces Market Niche objects. Publishes to MQTT.

fit_coop.title: Open Event Emitter
fit_coop.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — cooperative signaling emitter.
fit_coop.role: Broadcasts the agent's current state (fitness, niche, active conditions) to the ecosystem as cooperative signals. Enables emergent cooperation without direct agent coupling.
fit_coop.tech: Rust (tr4d3rz-messaging). Publishes to ecosystem/signal/{agent_id} MQTT topic. CBOR payload, QoS 0.
fit_coop.relations: Produces Cooperative Signal objects. Publishes to MQTT ecosystem/signal/# topic.

fit_metrics.title: Base Metrics (trade_count · success_rate · CAGR · profit_factor)
fit_metrics.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

fit_advanced.title: Advanced Metrics (signal_entropy · stat_confidence · computational_efficiency)
fit_advanced.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

sig_broker.title: Prediction Broker
sig_broker.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — signal aggregation and prediction.
sig_broker.role: Aggregates cooperative signals from multiple agents to produce the final daily investment signals. Uses ensemble voting weighted by agent fitness.
sig_broker.tech: Rust (tr4d3rz-messaging). Subscribes to ecosystem/signal/# and ecosystem/archetype/#. Produces daily signals via weighted ensemble.
sig_broker.relations: Consumes Cooperative Signals. Produces Investment Signals for Prediction Service.

sig_router.title: Event Router (QoS-aware dispatch)
sig_router.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

sig_sub.title: Subscription Manager (topic filters · wildcards)
sig_sub.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

data_genome.title: Hybrid Graph Genome (CBOR · L-System generated)
data_genome.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

data_fsm.title: FSM Definition (state · transition · condition)
data_fsm.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

data_signal.title: Cooperative Signal (CBOR · QoS 0)
data_signal.type_desc: ArchiMate Business Object — inter-agent communication payload.
data_signal.role: The cooperative signal broadcast by each agent to the ecosystem. Contains the agent's current state: fitness, niche, active conditions, and investment signals.
data_signal.tech: CBOR format. Schema: {agent_id, niche_id, fitness_vector, active_conditions, signal_type, isin, action, confidence, timestamp_ms}. QoS 0 (fire-and-forget).
data_signal.relations: Produced by Open Event Emitter. Consumed by Cooperative Conditions and Observatory.

data_fitness.title: Fitness Record (CBOR · QoS 1)
data_fitness.type_desc: ArchiMate Business Object — fitness evaluation result.
data_fitness.role: The multi-dimensional fitness record for each agent after evaluation. Contains all fitness dimensions for niche discovery and archetype selection.
data_fitness.tech: CBOR format. Schema: {agent_id, timestamp_ms, trade_count, cagr, profit_factor, signal_entropy, stat_confidence, comp_efficiency, composite_fitness}. QoS 1.
data_fitness.relations: Produced by Fitness Calculator. Consumed by Niche Evaluator and Persistence Service.

data_event.title: System Event (CBOR · QoS 1 · append-only)
data_event.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

hw_android.title: Android Powerful (ARM64)
hw_android.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Device — a physical IT resource.
hw_android.role: Mobile Evolution Node. Runs the full evolutionary pipeline on ARM64 Android. Enables evolution on mobile devices, expanding the computational ecology.
hw_android.tech: ARM64, Android. Rust runtime compiled for aarch64-linux-android. MQTT client via TCP:1883 or WS:8083.
hw_android.relations: Hosts Evolutionary Computing Service (mobile). Connects to RPi1 via MQTT.

rt_rust.title: Rust Runtime
rt_rust.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology System Software — software environment for components.
rt_rust.role: The Rust runtime environment for all tr4d3rz components: tr4d3rz-core, tr4d3rz-evolution, tr4d3rz-messaging, tr4d3rz-persistence. Provides memory safety and zero-cost abstractions.
rt_rust.tech: Rust stable (2021 edition). Key crates: tokio (async), petgraph (graphs), serde/ciborium (CBOR), rumqttc (MQTT client), polars (dataframes).

net_mqtt.title: MQTT Service (TCP:1883 · WS:8083)
net_mqtt.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Service — an explicitly defined exposed technology behavior.
net_mqtt.role: The MQTT messaging service exposed by NanoMQ. TCP:1883 for embedded and server nodes; WS:8083 for browser-based Observatory. The backbone of all inter-node communication.
net_mqtt.tech: MQTT 3.1.1 and 5.0. Topic hierarchy: data/ohlcv/#, ecosystem/signal/#, ecosystem/fitness/#, ecosystem/niche/#, ecosystem/archetype/#, embedded/capsule/#.
net_mqtt.relations: Realized by NanoMQ Broker. Used by all nodes.

goal_observe.title: Full Ecosystem Observability
goal_observe.role: Every evolutionary event must be observable, replayable, and visualizable in real-time. The system must be transparent enough for human researchers to understand emergent behaviors.
goal_observe.tech: Implemented via the Observatory Service (TypeScript/Three.js), WASM FSM Replay, event sourcing in SQLite/Parquet, and MQTT WebSocket streaming.
goal_observe.relations: Realized by the Observatory Service. Supported by the Persistence Service event store.

prin_replay.title: Distributed Observability
prin_replay.type_desc: ArchiMate Principle — a fundamental architectural guideline.
prin_replay.role: All evolutionary events must be serializable and replayable. The system must support temporal replay of any past ecosystem state for research and debugging.
prin_replay.tech: Implemented via append-only SQLite event log, Parquet historical archive, WASM FSM Replay in the browser, and the Replay System in the Observatory.
prin_replay.relations: Influences the Observatory Service. Realized by the Persistence Service and Event Logger.

prin_coop.title: Cooperative Signaling
prin_coop.type_desc: ArchiMate Principle — a fundamental architectural guideline.
prin_coop.role: Agents communicate via events (MQTT signals), not direct references. This enables loose coupling and emergent cooperative behaviors without central coordination.
prin_coop.tech: Implemented via the Cooperative Signal MQTT topic (ecosystem/signal/#, CBOR, QoS 0) and the Cooperative Conditions package in tr4d3rz-core.
prin_coop.relations: Influences the Cooperative Signal Generation process. Realized by the Signaling System.

proc_observe.title: Ecosystem Observation & Replay
proc_observe.type_desc: ArchiMate Business Process — a sequence of behaviors achieving a business outcome.
proc_observe.role: Provides real-time and historical views of the ecosystem: node deployment map, theory map, 3D galaxy visualization, signal ecology heatmap, and temporal replay.
proc_observe.tech: Implemented by Observatory Service (TypeScript/Vite/Three.js) in tr4d3rz-observatory. Connects to NanoMQ via MQTT WebSocket (WS:8083).
proc_observe.relations: Realized by Observatory Service. Consumes all MQTT topics.

svc_monitoring.title: Monitoring Service
svc_monitoring.type_desc: ArchiMate Business Service — an explicitly defined exposed business behavior.
svc_monitoring.role: Real-time health monitoring of all ecosystem nodes: MQTT connectivity, evolution rate, fitness distribution, niche count, and archetype stability.
svc_monitoring.tech: Implemented via the Deploy Architecture Map in the Observatory. Subscribes to all MQTT topics and tracks last-seen timestamps for each node.

obs_svc.title: Observatory Service
obs_svc.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Service — ecosystem visualization and monitoring.
obs_svc.role: The main service of Observatory Nodes (Browser, Tablet, Smartphone). Provides real-time and historical views of the ecosystem via a web-based dashboard.
obs_svc.tech: TypeScript/Vite/React (tr4d3rz-observatory). Connects to NanoMQ via MQTT WebSocket (WS:8083). Three.js for 3D visualization. WASM for FSM replay.
obs_svc.relations: Realizes Ecosystem Observation process. Serves Monitoring Service.

obs_deploymap.title: Deploy Architecture Map
obs_deploymap.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — node deployment visualization.
obs_deploymap.role: Shows the real-time status of all ecosystem nodes: connectivity, evolution rate, last-seen timestamp, MQTT topic activity. The operational dashboard of TR4D3RZ.
obs_deploymap.tech: TypeScript/D3.js. Subscribes to all MQTT topics. Updates node status in real-time via WebSocket.
obs_deploymap.relations: Consumes all MQTT topics. Visualizes node connectivity.

obs_theorymap.title: Theory Map
obs_theorymap.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — archetype and FSM browser.
obs_theorymap.role: Provides a browsable library of discovered archetypes (proven FSM motifs). Allows researchers to inspect FSM graphs, fitness histories, and market conditions where each archetype excels.
obs_theorymap.tech: TypeScript/React. Fetches archetypes from Persistence Service. Renders FSM graphs using D3.js force layout.
obs_theorymap.relations: Consumes Archetype data from Persistence Service.

obs_galaxy.title: Evolution Galaxy [3D]
obs_galaxy.role: Renders the entire ecosystem as a 3D galaxy: each agent is a star, niches are clusters, fitness is brightness, cooperative signals are particle streams. The flagship visualization of TR4D3RZ.
obs_galaxy.tech: Three.js/WebGL. Each agent mapped to 3D coordinates via fitness vector PCA. Real-time updates via MQTT WebSocket. Supports up to 10,000 simultaneous agents.
obs_galaxy.relations: Consumes Fitness Records and Niche data from MQTT.

obs_ecology.title: Signal Ecology View
obs_ecology.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — cooperative signal heatmap.
obs_ecology.role: Visualizes the cooperative signaling patterns across the ecosystem as a heatmap: which agents are signaling to which, signal frequency, and emergent communication clusters.
obs_ecology.tech: TypeScript/D3.js heatmap. Subscribes to ecosystem/signal/# MQTT topic. Aggregates signal frequency by agent pair.

obs_market.title: Market Overlay
obs_market.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — market-ecosystem correlation view.
obs_market.role: Correlates ecosystem events (archetype activations, niche shifts, fitness spikes) with market events (earnings, volatility, sector rotations). Enables research into market-ecology relationships.
obs_market.tech: TypeScript/React. Overlays OHLCV data with ecosystem event timeline. Subscribes to data/ohlcv/# and ecosystem/# MQTT topics.
obs_market.relations: Consumes OHLCV data and ecosystem events from MQTT.

obs_replay.title: Replay System
obs_replay.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — temporal ecosystem replay.
obs_replay.role: Allows researchers to replay any past ecosystem state: scrub through time, rewind to specific events, and observe how the ecosystem evolved. Essential for research and debugging.
obs_replay.tech: TypeScript/React. Reads from Persistence Service event store. Supports temporal scrubbing, event filtering, and speed control.
obs_replay.relations: Reads from Persistence Service event store.

obs_wasm.title: WASM FSM Replay
obs_wasm.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — browser-side FSM execution.
obs_wasm.role: Executes FSM agents directly in the browser using WebAssembly, enabling researchers to replay individual agent decisions against historical OHLCV data without server-side computation.
obs_wasm.tech: Rust compiled to WASM (wasm-pack). Runs the same FSM Runtime as Evolution Nodes. Accepts FSM CBOR + OHLCV CSV as input.
obs_wasm.relations: Executes FSM Capsules in browser. Consumes OHLCV data.

data_ohlcv.title: OHLCV Payload (JSON · ADR-0004 schema)
data_ohlcv.type_desc: ArchiMate Business Object — the data contract for market data.
data_ohlcv.role: The standardized OHLCV data payload published to MQTT by the scraper. Defined in ADR-0004 with minified keys for bandwidth efficiency.
data_ohlcv.tech: JSON format. Schema: {isin: string, o: float, h: float, l: float, c: float, v: int, t: string, ts: int}. Published to data/ohlcv/history/{isin} and data/ohlcv/intraday/{isin}.
data_ohlcv.relations: Produced by borsa-italiana-scraper. Consumed by Evolution Nodes.

data_archetype.title: Archetype (CBOR · QoS 2)
data_archetype.type_desc: ArchiMate Business Object — proven FSM motif.
data_archetype.role: A proven high-fitness FSM pattern broadcast to all nodes for seeding new genomes. QoS 2 ensures exactly-once delivery for this critical knowledge transfer.
data_archetype.tech: CBOR format. Schema: {archetype_id, fsm_cbor, fitness_vector, discovery_timestamp, niche_id, usage_count}. QoS 2 (exactly once). Published to ecosystem/archetype/#.
data_archetype.relations: Produced by Persistence Service. Consumed by Evolution Nodes and Observatory Theory Map.

hw_browser.title: Web Browser (Chrome/Firefox)
hw_browser.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Device — a virtual IT resource.
hw_browser.role: The primary Observatory Node. Runs the full Observatory Service including 3D Galaxy visualization (Three.js/WebGL) and WASM FSM Replay. Connects to NanoMQ via WebSocket.
hw_browser.tech: Chrome/Firefox with WebGL and WebAssembly support. TypeScript/Vite/React. MQTT via WebSocket (WS:8083). Three.js for 3D. WASM for FSM replay.
hw_browser.relations: Hosts Observatory Service. Connects to RPi1 via MQTT WebSocket.

web_server.title: Web Server (static assets · Observatory UI)
web_server.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

rt_wasm.title: WebAssembly Runtime
rt_wasm.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology System Software — browser-side execution environment.
rt_wasm.role: The WebAssembly runtime in the browser for FSM replay. Enables the same Rust FSM code used in Evolution Nodes to run directly in the browser without server-side computation.
rt_wasm.tech: wasm-pack compiled Rust. WASM module size: ~200KB. Runs FSM state machine against OHLCV CSV input. Supported in all modern browsers.

rt_threejs.title: Three.js / WebGL
rt_threejs.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology System Software — 3D rendering environment.
rt_threejs.role: The 3D rendering engine for the Evolution Galaxy visualization. Renders up to 10,000 agent-stars with real-time updates via MQTT WebSocket.
rt_threejs.tech: Three.js r160+. WebGL 2.0. InstancedMesh for performance (10K+ agents). Custom shader for fitness-based star brightness. Orbit controls for navigation.

opt_svc.title: Optimization Service
opt_svc.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

opt_tuning.title: Parameter Tuning (micro-optimization)
opt_tuning.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

opt_validation.title: Micro Validation (local fitness check)
opt_validation.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

opt_local.title: Local Optimizer (offline genome tuning)
opt_local.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

opt_capsule.title: Capsule Manager (CBOR I/O · UART/USB)
opt_capsule.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

capsule_mgr.title: Genome Capsule Manager
capsule_mgr.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — offline genome packaging.
capsule_mgr.role: Packages genomes, archetypes, and OHLCV datasets into self-contained Capsules for deployment to offline embedded nodes. Enables evolution on nodes without network connectivity.
capsule_mgr.tech: Rust (tr4d3rz-embedded, no_std). Capsule format: CBOR with header (version, node_id, timestamp) + genome FSM + compressed OHLCV dataset.
capsule_mgr.relations: Produces Genome Capsule objects. Delivered via UART Bridge.

capsule_cbor.title: CBOR Serializer
capsule_cbor.role: Serializes and deserializes all data structures to/from CBOR format for embedded nodes. Uses no_std Rust for compatibility with bare-metal environments (no OS, no heap allocator).
capsule_cbor.tech: Rust no_std (ciborium or serde_cbor with no_std feature). Supports fixed-size buffers for embedded targets. Used on STM32, ESP8266, STR-E912.
capsule_cbor.relations: Serializes Genome Capsules and FSM data for embedded deployment.

data_capsule.title: Genome Capsule (CBOR file · offline sync)
data_capsule.type_desc: ArchiMate Business Object — offline evolution package.
data_capsule.role: A self-contained package for deploying evolution to offline embedded nodes. Contains a genome FSM and compressed OHLCV dataset, enabling nodes to evolve without network connectivity.
data_capsule.tech: CBOR binary file. Delivered via UART Bridge. Produced by Genome Capsule Manager. Consumed by Micro FSM Runtime on embedded nodes.
data_capsule.relations: Produced by Genome Capsule Manager. Delivered via UART to embedded nodes.

hw_esp.title: ESP8266 D1 Mini (Xtensa · 80MHz)
hw_esp.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Device — a physical IT resource.
hw_esp.role: Low-power WiFi Optimization Node. The ESP8266 has built-in WiFi, making it the simplest node to connect to the MQTT ecosystem. Limited RAM (80KB) constrains genome complexity.
hw_esp.tech: ESP8266, Xtensa LX106, 80MHz, 80KB RAM. Arduino/Rust. Built-in WiFi. MQTT via TCP:1883. Genome complexity limited to small FSMs.
hw_esp.relations: Hosts Micro FSM Runtime (WiFi). Connects via MQTT.

rt_cbor.title: CBOR Serialization (embedded · no_std · FlatBuffers alt.)
rt_cbor.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

net_uart.title: UART Service
net_uart.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Service — serial communication service.
net_uart.role: The UART serial communication service for embedded nodes without WiFi (STM32F107, STR-E912). Provides reliable message delivery via CBOR framing over serial.
net_uart.tech: 115200 baud, 8N1. CBOR framing: 4-byte length prefix + CBOR payload. Handled by UART Bridge in Gateway Node.
net_uart.relations: Used by STM32F107 and STR-E912 nodes. Bridged to MQTT by Gateway Node.

capsule_fs.title: Genome Capsule Files (CBOR binary)
capsule_fs.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Artifact — a physical piece of data.
capsule_fs.role: Self-contained binary files containing a genome FSM + compressed OHLCV dataset for deployment to offline embedded nodes. The offline evolution mechanism of TR4D3RZ.
capsule_fs.tech: CBOR binary format. Header: {version, node_id, timestamp, genome_size, dataset_size}. Payload: FSM CBOR + compressed OHLCV. Delivered via UART Bridge.
capsule_fs.relations: Produced by Genome Capsule Manager. Delivered to embedded nodes via UART.

goal_predict.title: Discover Predictive Patterns
goal_predict.type_desc: ArchiMate Goal — a desired end-state the architecture is designed to achieve.
goal_predict.role: The primary scientific goal of TR4D3RZ: discover statistically significant, non-obvious patterns in Italian stock market OHLCV data through evolutionary computation rather than manual feature engineering.
goal_predict.tech: Achieved via L-System genome generation → FSM compilation → backtesting on historical OHLCV data → fitness evaluation with stat_confidence metric.
goal_predict.relations: Realized by the Evolutionary Process. Influenced by the OHLCV Data Driver.

prin_niche.title: Emergent Niche Specialization
prin_niche.type_desc: ArchiMate Principle — a fundamental architectural guideline.
prin_niche.role: Market niches (clusters of similar FSM behaviors) must emerge from fitness dynamics, not be predefined. The Niche Discovery module clusters agents by behavioral similarity.
prin_niche.tech: Implemented via the Niche Evaluator in tr4d3rz-evolution, publishing to ecosystem/niche/# MQTT topics.
prin_niche.relations: Influences the Evolutionary Process. Realized by the Niche Evaluator component.

driver_emergence.title: Emergent Structure Discovery
driver_emergence.type_desc: ArchiMate Driver — an external or internal condition that motivates the architecture.
driver_emergence.role: The system must be capable of discovering market structures (niches, archetypes, cooperative clusters) that were not known at design time.
driver_emergence.tech: Enabled by the Niche Discovery module, the Archetype Store, and the Signal Ecology View in the Observatory.

hw_linux.title: Linux PCs (x86_64)
hw_linux.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Device — a physical IT resource.
hw_linux.role: The primary Evolution Nodes. Run the full evolutionary pipeline: genome generation, FSM compilation, fitness evaluation, mutation, and cooperative signaling. Highest computational capacity.
hw_linux.tech: x86_64, multi-core. Linux. Rust runtime (tr4d3rz-core, tr4d3rz-evolution, tr4d3rz-messaging). MQTT client via TCP:1883.
hw_linux.relations: Hosts Evolutionary Computing Service. Connects to RPi1 via MQTT.

hw_m24lr.title: M24LR Discovery (NFC/RFID · I2C · STM32)
hw_m24lr.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Device — a hardware resource.
hw_m24lr.role: NFC/RFID + I2C hardware module mounted on STM32. Enables contactless genome capsule transfer. Acts as Offline IoT node for evolutionary optimization without network connectivity.
hw_m24lr.tech: M24LR-DISCOVERY from ST Microelectronics. Dual-interface EEPROM: RF (ISO 15693 NFC) + I2C. 64 Kbit. Paired with STM32 Nucleo/Discovery board.

net_nfc.title: NFC/RFID Service (ISO 15693)
net_nfc.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Service — an infrastructure service.
net_nfc.role: Contactless data transfer via ISO 15693 NFC protocol. Used to exchange genome capsules with other nodes (phone, tablet, Evolution Node) without cables.
net_nfc.tech: M24LR ISO 15693 RF interface. Range: ~10cm. Data rate: 6.6–26.5 Kbps. No pairing required.

net_i2c.title: I2C Service (capsule R/W)
net_i2c.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Service — an infrastructure service.
net_i2c.role: Wired I2C interface for capsule read/write to local flash or EEPROM. Used as the fallback/complement to NFC for wired bench access.
net_i2c.tech: I2C at 100/400 KHz. Address: 0x50 (data), 0x57 (system). STM32 HAL I2C driver.

hw_mimx.title: MIMXRT1050-EVK (Cortex-M7 · 600MHz)
hw_mimx.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Device — a physical IT resource.
hw_mimx.role: High-performance embedded Evolution Node. The Cortex-M7 at 600MHz is capable of running the full evolutionary pipeline in a microcontroller form factor.
hw_mimx.tech: NXP MIMXRT1050, Cortex-M7, 600MHz, 512KB SRAM. FreeRTOS or bare-metal. Rust no_std. Ethernet or WiFi for MQTT connectivity.
hw_mimx.relations: Hosts Evolutionary Computing Service (embedded HPC). Connects via MQTT.

hw_phone.title: Android Smartphone
hw_phone.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Device — a physical IT resource.
hw_phone.role: Mobile Observatory Node (light). Runs a simplified Observatory view optimized for small screens: Deploy Map and Signal Ecology only.
hw_phone.tech: Android smartphone with Chrome browser. Simplified Observatory Service. Optimized for small screen and limited bandwidth.
hw_phone.relations: Hosts Observatory Service (mobile light). Connects via MQTT WebSocket.

hw_ra8.title: Renesas RA8 (Cortex-M85 · 480MHz)
hw_ra8.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Device — a physical IT resource.
hw_ra8.role: Medium-power Optimization Node. Cortex-M85 with Helium SIMD extensions enables efficient FSM execution and fitness evaluation.
hw_ra8.tech: Renesas RA8, Cortex-M85, 480MHz. Rust no_std. WiFi/Ethernet for MQTT. Helium SIMD for vectorized fitness computation.
hw_ra8.relations: Hosts Micro FSM Runtime. Connects via MQTT.

net_usb.title: USB/Filesystem Service (capsule exchange)
net_usb.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

proc_persist.title: Ecosystem Memory
proc_persist.type_desc: ArchiMate Business Process — a sequence of behaviors achieving a business outcome.
proc_persist.role: Captures all evolutionary events (mutations, deaths, signals, migrations, archetype discoveries) in an append-only event store for historical analysis and replay.
proc_persist.tech: Implemented by Event Logger (Rust, SQLite WAL) and Persistence Service (Rust, Parquet export) on RPi2/Persistence Nodes. Event schema includes type, agent_id, timestamp, payload.
proc_persist.relations: Realized by Persistence Service. Produces Event Log, SQLite Database, Parquet Files.

svc_knowledge.title: Knowledge Service
svc_knowledge.type_desc: ArchiMate Business Service — an explicitly defined exposed business behavior.
svc_knowledge.role: Provides access to the accumulated evolutionary knowledge: archetype library (proven FSM motifs), niche atlas (market clusters), and lineage trees.
svc_knowledge.tech: Served by the Persistence Service via the Archetype Store (SQLite) and Parquet historical archive. Accessed by the Theory Map in the Observatory.
svc_knowledge.relations: Served by Persistence Service. Consumed by Observatory Theory Map.

per_svc.title: Persistence Service
per_svc.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

per_lineage.title: Lineage Storage (birth · death · mutation)
per_lineage.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

per_archetype.title: Archetype Memory (motif FSM · patterns · niches)
per_archetype.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

per_events.title: Event Logger (mutation · signal · migration)
per_events.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

per_relay.title: Relay Service (delayed sync · offline nodes)
per_relay.role: An architectural element within the TR4D3RZ distributed system.

hw_rasp2.title: Raspberry Pi 2 (ARMv7 · 900MHz)
hw_rasp2.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Device — a physical IT resource.
hw_rasp2.role: The primary Persistence Node. More capable than RPi1 (ARMv7, quad-core, 1GB RAM), suitable for SQLite and Parquet operations.
hw_rasp2.tech: ARMv7, 900MHz quad-core, 1GB RAM. Linux. Rust runtime (tr4d3rz-persistence). SQLite WAL, Parquet files.
hw_rasp2.relations: Hosts Persistence Service. Connects to RPi1 via MQTT.

db_sqlite.title: SQLite Database (WAL mode)
db_sqlite.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Artifact — a physical piece of data.
db_sqlite.role: The primary operational database for TR4D3RZ. Stores event log, archetype library, niche atlas, and signal history. WAL mode enables concurrent reads during writes.
db_sqlite.tech: SQLite 3.x with WAL mode. Tables: events, archetypes, niches, signals, agents. Indexed by timestamp and agent_id. Located on RPi1 (events) and RPi2 (archetypes).
db_sqlite.relations: Written by Event Logger and Persistence Service. Read by Replay System and Theory Map.

db_parquet.title: Parquet Files (historical archive)
db_parquet.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Artifact — a physical piece of data.
db_parquet.role: Long-term historical archive of OHLCV data and fitness records in columnar Parquet format. Enables efficient large-scale analysis with pandas/polars.
db_parquet.tech: Apache Parquet format. Partitioned by date and ISIN. Compressed with Snappy. Located on RPi2 or external storage. Exported by Parquet Exporter.
db_parquet.relations: Written by Parquet Exporter. Read by offline analysis tools.

log_events.title: Event Log
log_events.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Artifact — a physical piece of data.
log_events.role: The append-only log of all evolutionary events: mutations, deaths, signals, migrations, archetype discoveries, niche formations. The complete history of the ecosystem.
log_events.tech: SQLite table: events(event_id, event_type, agent_id, timestamp_ms, payload_cbor). Append-only (no UPDATE/DELETE). Indexed by timestamp.
log_events.relations: Written by Event Logger. Read by Replay System.

driver_italian.title: Italian Stock Market OHLCV Data
driver_italian.type_desc: ArchiMate Driver — an external data source that drives the system.
driver_italian.role: The primary data input: Open, High, Low, Close, Volume data for ~429 Italian companies from borsaitaliana.it, scraped daily and intraday.
driver_italian.tech: Scraped by borsa-italiana-scraper (Node.js 14.15.1) running on RPi1. Schema defined in ADR-0004: {o, h, l, c, v, t, ts} with Unix ms timestamps.
driver_italian.relations: Consumed by the Market Data Ingestion process. Published to data/ohlcv/# MQTT topic.

proc_ingest.title: Market Data Ingestion
proc_ingest.type_desc: ArchiMate Business Process — a sequence of behaviors achieving a business outcome.
proc_ingest.role: Acquires OHLCV data from borsaitaliana.it, normalizes it to the ADR-0004 schema, and publishes it to the MQTT broker for consumption by Evolution Nodes.
proc_ingest.tech: Implemented by borsa-italiana-scraper (Node.js 14.15.1) on RPi1. Runs daily at 18:30 (historical) and every 15min during market hours (intraday). Rate-limited to avoid IP bans.
proc_ingest.relations: Realized by Core Infrastructure Service. Produces OHLCV Payload data objects.

ci_svc.title: Core Infrastructure Service
ci_svc.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Service — an explicitly defined exposed application behavior.
ci_svc.role: The central service of the Core Infrastructure Node (RPi1). Orchestrates data ingestion, MQTT brokering, event logging, and persistence. The backbone of the entire ecosystem.
ci_svc.tech: Composed of NanoMQ Broker, borsa-italiana-scraper, Event Logger, Persistence Service, and Cron Scheduler. Deployed on Raspberry Pi 1 (ARM1176, 700MHz).
ci_svc.relations: Realizes Market Data Ingestion process. Serves Prediction Service.

ci_broker.title: NanoMQ Broker
ci_broker.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — an encapsulation of application functionality.
ci_broker.role: The central MQTT message broker for the entire TR4D3RZ ecosystem. All inter-node communication passes through this component. Selected over Mosquitto due to ARMv6l compatibility issues.
ci_broker.tech: NanoMQ compiled from source for ARMv6l. Supports MQTT 3.1.1 and 5.0. TCP:1883 for embedded nodes, WS:8083 for browser Observatory. Max ~1000 concurrent connections on RPi1.
ci_broker.relations: Realizes MQTT Service. Used by all Evolution, Observatory, and Persistence Nodes.

ci_scraper.title: borsa-italiana-scraper
ci_scraper.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — an encapsulation of application functionality.
ci_scraper.role: Scrapes OHLCV data from borsaitaliana.it for ~429 Italian companies. Transforms data to ADR-0004 schema and publishes to MQTT broker. The sole data ingestion point.
ci_scraper.tech: Node.js 14.15.1 (ARMv6l compatible). Uses p-limit@4 (downgraded from v5 for Node 14 compatibility). Runs on cron schedule: 18:30 daily (historical) + 15min intraday.
ci_scraper.relations: Produces OHLCV Payload data objects. Publishes to data/ohlcv/# MQTT topic.

ci_logger.title: Event Logger [M2]
ci_logger.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — planned for Milestone 2.
ci_logger.role: Captures all ecosystem events (mutations, deaths, signals, archetype discoveries) in an append-only SQLite database with WAL mode for concurrent reads.
ci_logger.tech: Rust implementation (tr4d3rz-persistence). SQLite with WAL mode. Event schema: {event_type, agent_id, timestamp_ms, payload_cbor}. Planned for Milestone 2.
ci_logger.relations: Writes to SQLite Database and Event Log artifacts.

ci_persist.title: Persistence Service [M2]
ci_persist.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — planned for Milestone 2.
ci_persist.role: Manages long-term storage of archetypes, niche atlas, and historical OHLCV data. Exports to Parquet format for large dataset analysis. Serves the Knowledge Service.
ci_persist.tech: Rust implementation (tr4d3rz-persistence). SQLite for archetypes, Parquet for historical data. Planned for Milestone 2.
ci_persist.relations: Reads/writes SQLite Database and Parquet Files. Serves Knowledge Service.

ci_cron.title: Cron Scheduler
ci_cron.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — an encapsulation of application functionality.
ci_cron.role: Triggers the borsa-italiana-scraper on a market-hours-aware schedule. Knows Italian stock market hours (09:00-17:30 CET) and triggers intraday scraping only during market hours.
ci_cron.tech: Linux cron on RPi1. Daily historical scrape at 18:30 CET. Intraday scrape every 15 minutes between 09:00-17:30 CET on trading days.

hw_rpi1.title: Raspberry Pi 1 (ARM1176 · ARMv6l · 700MHz)
hw_rpi1.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Device — a physical IT resource.
hw_rpi1.role: The Core Infrastructure Node of TR4D3RZ. Hosts the NanoMQ MQTT broker and borsa-italiana-scraper. The single point of data ingestion and message routing for the entire ecosystem.
hw_rpi1.tech: ARM1176JZF-S, ARMv6l, 700MHz, 512MB RAM. Linux 5.10.103+. NanoMQ compiled from source for ARMv6l. Node.js 14.15.1. Power consumption: ~3W.
hw_rpi1.relations: Hosts Core Infrastructure Service. Connected to all other nodes via MQTT.

mqtt_broker.title: NanoMQ Broker [ARMv6l compiled]
mqtt_broker.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Node — a computational resource.
mqtt_broker.role: The MQTT message broker running on RPi1. All inter-node communication passes through this node. NanoMQ was selected over Mosquitto due to ARMv6l compatibility (Mosquitto 2.x has Illegal Instruction bugs on ARM1176).
mqtt_broker.tech: NanoMQ compiled from source for ARMv6l. MQTT 3.1.1 and 5.0. TCP:1883 (embedded nodes), WS:8083 (browser). Max ~1000 concurrent connections.
mqtt_broker.relations: Realizes MQTT Service. Central hub for all ecosystem communication.

rt_nodejs.title: Node.js 14.15.1
rt_nodejs.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology System Software — software environment for components.
rt_nodejs.role: The Node.js runtime for borsa-italiana-scraper on RPi1. Version 14.15.1 is the highest version compatible with ARMv6l. p-limit downgraded to v4 for Node 14 compatibility.
rt_nodejs.tech: Node.js 14.15.1 LTS on ARMv6l. Key packages: axios@1.6 (HTTP), p-limit@4 (concurrency), mqtt (MQTT client). ES Modules supported.

net_https.title: HTTPS Service (borsaitaliana.it REST API)
net_https.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Service — an external data service.
net_https.role: The external HTTPS API of borsaitaliana.it used by the scraper to fetch OHLCV data. Rate-limited; the scraper uses p-limit to avoid IP bans.
net_https.tech: HTTPS REST API. Endpoints: /borsa/azioni/{isin}/scheda.html (historical), /borsa/azioni/{isin}/intraday.html (intraday). HTML parsing with cheerio.

hw_stm32f1.title: STM32F107VC (Cortex-M3 · 72MHz)
hw_stm32f1.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Device — a physical IT resource.
hw_stm32f1.role: Low-power UART Optimization Node. No built-in WiFi; communicates via UART to a Gateway Node. Represents the most constrained evolutionary node in the ecosystem.
hw_stm32f1.tech: STM32F107VC, Cortex-M3, 72MHz, 64KB SRAM. Rust no_std. UART at 115200 baud. Genome Capsule delivery via Gateway Node.
hw_stm32f1.relations: Hosts Micro FSM Runtime (UART). Connects via Gateway Node.

hw_stm32f3.title: STM32F3 Discovery (Cortex-M4 · 72MHz)
hw_stm32f3.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Device — a physical IT resource.
hw_stm32f3.role: Medium-power Optimization Node. Cortex-M4 with FPU enables floating-point fitness computation. WiFi connectivity via ESP8266 co-processor.
hw_stm32f3.tech: STM32F3, Cortex-M4F, 72MHz, 48KB SRAM. Rust no_std. WiFi via ESP8266 AT commands. MQTT over WiFi.
hw_stm32f3.relations: Hosts Micro FSM Runtime. Connects via MQTT (WiFi via ESP8266).

gw_svc.title: Gateway Service
gw_svc.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Service — UART-to-MQTT protocol translation.
gw_svc.role: Bridges the gap between UART-only embedded nodes (STM32F107, STR-E912) and the MQTT ecosystem. Translates CBOR-framed UART messages to MQTT and vice versa.
gw_svc.tech: Python or Rust (tr4d3rz-messaging). Runs on Linux PC or RPi. Serial port: 115200 baud, 8N1. CBOR framing with length prefix.
gw_svc.relations: Realizes Evolutionary Process for embedded nodes. Bridges UART and MQTT.

gw_uart.title: UART Bridge
gw_uart.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — serial communication handler.
gw_uart.role: Handles the low-level UART serial communication with embedded nodes. Implements CBOR framing protocol for reliable message delivery over serial.
gw_uart.tech: Python (pyserial) or Rust (serialport crate). CBOR framing: 4-byte length prefix + CBOR payload. Handles partial reads and frame reassembly.
gw_uart.relations: Communicates with STM32F107 and STR-E912 via UART.

gw_protocol.title: Protocol Translator
gw_protocol.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — UART/USB to MQTT translation.
gw_protocol.role: Translates between UART/USB CBOR messages and MQTT topics. Maps embedded node message types to the correct MQTT topic hierarchy.
gw_protocol.tech: Rust (tr4d3rz-messaging). Topic mapping: embedded/fitness/{node_id} → ecosystem/fitness/{node_id}. Handles CBOR deserialization and re-serialization.
gw_protocol.relations: Translates between UART Bridge and MQTT broker.

gw_delayed.title: Delayed Sync
gw_delayed.type_desc: ArchiMate Application Component — offline capsule queue management.
gw_delayed.role: Queues Genome Capsules for offline embedded nodes. When a node reconnects via UART, delivers queued capsules (new archetypes, updated fitness weights). Implements the offline-as-delayed philosophy.
gw_delayed.tech: Rust (tr4d3rz-messaging). Persistent queue in SQLite. Capsule delivery protocol: handshake → transfer → acknowledgment.
gw_delayed.relations: Manages Genome Capsule delivery to offline nodes.

hw_str.title: Olimex STR-E912 (ARM9 · 48MHz)
hw_str.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Device — a physical IT resource.
hw_str.role: Gateway Node. ARM9 processor with UART and network capabilities. Acts as the bridge between UART-only embedded nodes and the MQTT ecosystem.
hw_str.tech: STR912FAW44, ARM9, 48MHz, 96KB SRAM. Linux or bare-metal. Rust. UART + Ethernet. Runs Protocol Translator and Delayed Sync.
hw_str.relations: Hosts Gateway Service. Bridges UART nodes to MQTT.

hw_tablet.title: Android Tablet
hw_tablet.type_desc: ArchiMate Technology Device — a physical IT resource.
hw_tablet.role: Mobile Observatory Node. Runs the full Observatory Service on a larger screen, suitable for research sessions and presentations.
hw_tablet.tech: Android tablet with Chrome browser. Same Observatory Service as desktop browser. Optimized for touch interaction.
hw_tablet.relations: Hosts Observatory Service (mobile full). Connects via MQTT WebSocket.
